stemHtml: Both VORs at an airport are inoperative, and as a result aircraft are being vectored to runway 14. Which of the following ATC instructions is correct is such a situation?

options.b: Resume own navigation, position is ... proceed via ... for ILS approach runway 14.
options.c: Radar vectoring terminated, position is ... proceed via ... for ILS approach runway 14.
options.d: Radar vectors terminated, resume previously assigned navigation.
